name: Docs Experience Audit
when_to_use: Review existing documentation/help/agent-readable surfaces for friction, drift, accessibility, retrieval, or audience conflict

name: Docs Experience Design
when_to_use: Plan or reshape documentation IA, help strategy, examples, agent docs, or API/tool contract docs before implementation

name: Docs Experience Debug
when_to_use: Diagnose a concrete docs failure such as support tickets, confused onboarding, bad agent tool calls, stale examples, or zero-result searches

name: Docs Experience Measurement
when_to_use: Define telemetry, CI gates, sample tests, retrieval evals, feedback loops, or success metrics for documentation quality
